title: Decorative Core
description: A core library mod for some Yablon's mods
body:
# ✅ My Own-Developed web project!
Try my new own-developed project **Checkraft**: Checklist Hub for Minecraft players! Link: [See checklists](https://checkraft.com/)

**Decorative Core** is a lightweight library mod that provides shared code and rendering logic for storage-related decorative mods such as **Decorative Storage**.

It includes essential base classes for custom storage blocks and block entities, such as item count handling, synced overlays, and data persistence.

This mod does not add any new blocks or items on its own — it's only a dependency required by other mods in the **Decorative series**.

Make sure to install Decorative Core alongside any mod that requires it!

📦 List of mods that require this mod:
- [Decorative Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-storage)
